name: Arian Jamali
title: Full Stack Developer
professionalSummary: Full-stack developer with over 4 years of professional experience in designing, developing, deploying, and maintaining web applications. Proficient in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Vue.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Linux, with experience in UI development, API design and implementation, database management, and deployment in production environments. Delivered over 10 freelance projects from requirements analysis through development, deployment, and support, working directly with clients and technical teams. Passionate about building end-to-end solutions and learning new technologies across the entire software development lifecycle.

education.degree: High School Diploma in Mathematics and Physics

experience.role: Full Stack Developer & Technical Support Specialist
bullets: Maintained and supported over 30 websites and enterprise applications for clients across various industries.
Diagnosed and resolved over 100 technical issues related to hosting, deployment, and application infrastructure.
Collaborated with developers, designers, and stakeholders to implement new features, fix bugs, and improve the platform.
Managed production deployments, website updates, and ongoing maintenance activities to ensure system stability.
Provided technical support to over 50 clients, increasing user satisfaction through rapid response times.
Assisted in testing and troubleshooting web applications in Linux production environments.
Delivered over 20 web development projects using React, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and Node.js.
Developed responsive user interfaces and reusable components to improve development speed and maintainability.
Built and integrated REST APIs using Node.js and Express.js to support business processes.
Managed Linux-based deployments, updated applications, and maintained active projects.
Collaborated directly with over 10 regular clients to gather requirements and deliver custom solutions.
Provided long-term support and troubleshooting for client websites, applications, and backend systems.
Served over 100 customers per week in a fast-paced environment while maintaining high satisfaction rates.
Managed orders, payments, and customer interactions during peak hours.
Collaborated with team members to ensure smooth daily operations and effective service delivery.
Developed communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills through direct customer engagement.

projects.title: Campaign Management Dashboard
projects.description: Built a management dashboard with React, TypeScript, and TanStack Table featuring advanced filtering, sorting, inline editing, and API integration.

projects.title: User Management Platform
projects.description: Developed user profile management capabilities, role-based access control, and administrative tools connected to an API and PostgreSQL database.

projects.title: Browser Automation Tools
projects.description: Built browser automation workflows with Playwright and Node.js for data extraction, form submission, and repetitive web processes.

projects.title: Profile Management Dashboard
projects.description: Built a user profile management system with editable tables, dynamic forms, and role-based access using React and Tailwind CSS.
